name: Daily Questions
summary: A fresh question added every day by your Claude routine.

questions.questionText: What does the Swift `guard` statement do, and why prefer it over a nested `if`?
questions.answerText: It exits the current scope early when a condition fails, keeping the happy path un-indented. Bindings made in a `guard let` stay in scope after it.

questions.questionText: Which Swift keyword marks a type whose instances are copied on assignment?
